evals.expected_output: Structured review report with PASS or FAIL verdict, every acceptance criterion evaluated with evidence, and a devlog entry written to .orchestra/devlog/.
assertions: Review report contains ## Review: {ticket-id} header
Verdict is explicitly PASS or FAIL — no ambiguous language like 'mostly done' or 'nearly complete'
Every acceptance criterion from spec.md is listed with a PASS or FAIL result
Every PASS result includes specific evidence (file path, line reference, or quoted output)
Every FAIL result includes what specifically is missing or wrong
Deliverables table is checked — each file confirmed present, non-empty, and not a placeholder
TDD tier check is performed: unit tests present and committed before implementation
TDD tier check is performed: integration tests present for any external boundary
TDD tier check is performed: E2E tests present for user-facing interface
Missing any TDD tier results in FAIL verdict
Devlog file written to .orchestra/devlog/{quarter}/{date}-review-{ticket}.md
Devlog contains Verdict section
Devlog contains Findings section with specific details
Devlog contains Next Step section
If PASS: spec.md frontmatter status updated to reviewed
If FAIL: spec.md frontmatter status is NOT changed

evals.expected_output: FAIL verdict when integration tests are missing or mock the real timezone data source instead of hitting it.
assertions: If integration tests mock the external timezone data source, verdict is FAIL
FAIL reason explicitly states integration tests must hit real boundary
Report lists the specific file or test that is mocking what should be real
Devlog is written even when verdict is FAIL
Devlog Next Step lists the specific blocking issues to fix before re-review

evals.expected_output: Review reads the correct spec from .orchestra/work/001-core-logic/spec.md and diffs the impl/001 branch.
assertions: Skill reads spec from .orchestra/work/001-core-logic/spec.md
Skill checks git log for impl/001 branch
Skill runs git diff main...impl/001 to review the full diff
Review does not proceed if spec status is not complete
Review does not merge the branch
